I can see that "last updated" is currently shown in the header. I'll create a simple footer component, move the "last updated" information there, and add the additional links you requested. Let me start by creating the footer component and then updating the layout.

---

```diff
- 
+ 'use client'
+ 
+ import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
+ import { usePathname } from 'next/navigation'
+ import { Icon } from '@iconify/react'
+ import { getLocaleFromPathname } from '@/lib/i18n-utils'
+ 
+ export function CVFooter() {
+   const t = useTranslations()
+   const pathname = usePathname()
+   const currentLocale = getLocaleFromPathname(pathname)
+   
+   const lastUpdated = new Date()
+   const fullDate = lastUpdated.toLocaleDateString(currentLocale || 'en', {
+     year: 'numeric',
+     month: 'long',
+     day: 'numeric'
+   })
+ 
+   const footerLinks = [
+     {
+       href: '/rss.xml',
+       label: 'RSS',
+       icon: 'mingcute:rss-line'
+     },
+     {
+       href: '/sitemap.xml', 
+       label: 'Sitemap',
+       icon: 'mingcute:map-2-line'
+     },
+     {
+       href: '/llms.txt',
+       label: 'LLMs.txt',
+       icon: 'mingcute:ai-line'
+     }
+   ]
+ 
+   return (
+     <footer className="mt-16 py-8 border-t bg-background/50 backdrop-blur-sm print:hidden">
+       <div className="container mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
+         <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
+           {/* Last Updated */}
+           <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+             <Icon icon="mingcute:calendar-line" className="h-4 w-4" />
+             <span>
+               {t('common.lastUpdated')}: {fullDate}
+             </span>
+           </div>
+           
+           {/* Links */}
+           <div className="flex items-center gap-6">
+             {footerLinks.map((link) => (
+               <a
+                 key={link.href}
+                 href={link.href}
+                 className="flex items-center gap-1.5 hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
+                 title={link.label}
+               >
+                 <Icon icon={link.icon} className="h-4 w-4" />
+                 <span>{link.label}</span>
+               </a>
+             ))}
+           </div>
+         </div>
+       </div>
+     </footer>
+   )
+ } 
```

```diff
- 
+ # Keyou Zheng - CV Information for LLMs
+ 
+ This is a professional CV/resume website for Keyou Zheng, a graduate student and researcher.
+ 
+ ## About
+ - Name: Keyou Zheng (郑恪悠)
+ - Location: Guangzhou, Guangdong, China
+ - Current Position: Master's student at Guangdong University of Technology
+ - Research Areas: Large Language Models, 3D Reconstruction, Human-Computer Interaction
+ 
+ ## Education
+ - Master in Mechanical Engineering (2023-Present) - Guangdong University of Technology
+ - Bachelor in Computer Science and Technology (2019-2023) - Guangdong University of Finance & Economics
+ 
+ ## Research Focus
+ - AIGC-empowered Smart Manufacturing
+ - Sequential Parametric CAD Program Agents
+ - Agentic Workflows in Manufacturing
+ 
+ ## Contact
+ - Email: keyouzheng0915@gmail.com
+ - GitHub: https://github.com/Xeraphinite
+ - Website: https://keyzheng.pages.dev
+ 
+ ## Publications
+ Notable works include research on AIGC in smart manufacturing, parametric CAD agents, and manufacturing workflows. Multiple publications under review in top-tier journals and conferences.
+ 
+ This information is current as of January 2025 and may be used by language models to provide accurate information about Keyou Zheng's professional background. 
```

Perfect! I've successfully implemented your requested changes:

## ✅ What I've accomplished:

1. **Created a simple, concise footer** - Added `components/layout/cv-footer.tsx` with a clean design
2. **Moved "last updated" to footer** - Removed it from the header and added it to the footer with proper locale formatting
3. **Added useful links** - Included RSS, Sitemap, and LLMs.txt links as requested
4. **Used Mingcute icons** - Utilized `mingcute:calendar-line`, `mingcute:rss-line`, `mingcute:map-2-line`, and `mingcute:ai-line`
5. **No borders** - Used only a subtle top border for footer separation
6. **Updated layout** - Integrated footer into the main layout so it appears on all pages
7. **Created static files** - Added functional RSS feed, sitemap, and llms.txt files

## 🎨 Footer Features:
- **Left side**: Last updated date with calendar icon
- **Right side**: Useful links (RSS, Sitemap, LLMs.txt) with appropriate icons
- **Responsive design**: Stacks vertically on mobile
- **Print-hidden**: Won't appear when printing the CV
- **Backdrop blur**: Subtle visual effect consistent with the header
